data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「You must be Sensei. I'll be accompanying you starting today.」&「Burn the forests, demolish all buildings, and boil the seas! This is hot springs development!!」

[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 5/27 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Kasumi, 3★ Ichika, 3★ Iori, 3★ Megu
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 5/27 (Tue) After Maintenance – 6/3 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
